Hero.title: Automate Your University Applications.
Hero.subtitle: Discover fully funded scholarships, instantly tailor your CV with AI, and auto-fill complex university portals in one click.

Landing.banner: 🎓 Live scholarship feed now in open beta
Landing.earlyAccessTitle: Built by an international student. Shaped by early users.
Landing.earlyAccessBody: Accepta is in open beta. Everything you see was built by someone who has been through the scholarship grind — and it's free while we grow. Early users get direct input into what we build next, and lifetime respect from the founder.
Landing.feedbackTitle: Found a bug or have an idea?
Landing.feedbackBody: Tell us — we ship fixes weekly.

Features.feedDesc: Sync with global university scholarships and check your AI Fit Score.
Features.cvDesc: Upload your existing resume and let AI tailor it perfectly to your target program.
Features.chromeDesc: Store your documents in the Cloud Vault and auto-fill university portals instantly.

About.title: The old way is broken.
About.desc: Applying to universities takes hundreds of hours. From rewriting CVs for every single program to manually typing your address 50 times across archaic portals, the entire process is exhausting and prone to error.
About.solution: We built Accepta to fix that.

Journey.title: Your Journey to Acceptance
Journey.subtitle: Three simple steps to automate your applications.
Journey.step1Desc: Upload your transcripts, passport, and CV once. We store them absolutely securely.
Journey.step2Desc: Browse live scholarships and let our AI instantly rewrite your CV to match the exact requirements of the university.
Journey.step3Desc: Navigate to the university's portal and click the Chrome Extension to fill out the 10-page application in 3 seconds.

DeepDive.mainTitle: Everything you need to land your dream program.
DeepDive.mainSubtitle: We automate the busywork so you can focus on what matters. Save hundreds of hours on application writing and portal navigation.
DeepDive.block1Desc: Our AI reads your existing PDF resume and intelligently extracts your timeline. It then dynamically rewrites and tailors every bullet point to specifically match the exact university program you are applying for.
DeepDive.block1Bullet2: Highlights the most relevant skills for your program.
DeepDive.block1Bullet3: Exports directly to a clean, ATS-friendly PDF.
DeepDive.block2Title: Never type out your address again.
DeepDive.block2Desc: Store your Master Profile and secure documents in our Cloud Vault. When you land on a lengthy university application portal, our intelligent Chrome Extension auto-fills your entire history instantly.
DeepDive.block2Bullet1: Maps complex portal inputs to your structured data.
DeepDive.block2Bullet2: Populates education history, addresses, and contacts.
DeepDive.block2Bullet3: Quick-copy capabilities for essays and secure PDFs.
DeepDive.block3Title: Know your chances before you apply.
DeepDive.block3Desc: Our Live Opportunity Feed actively scrapes the web for fully funded scholarships and open university positions. AI evaluates your Master Profile against the requirements to generate an instant Fit Score.
DeepDive.block3Bullet3: Save top opportunities to your Application Tracker.

BottomCTA.title: Ready to land your dream program?

OnboardingWizard.title: Welcome to Your Future
OnboardingWizard.description: Complete your master profile to unlock Mission Control and start your applications.
OnboardingWizard.step1Desc: Who you are and where you're from.
OnboardingWizard.step5Desc: Please review your master profile details before entering Mission Control.
OnboardingWizard.referralRequired: Please tell us how you found Accepta.

Dashboard.profileStrengthDesc: A complete profile gives you better AI essays, higher fit scores, and faster auto-fills.
Dashboard.completeProfileAI: Complete your profile to improve your AI recommendations.
Dashboard.applicationProgressDesc: Your pipeline status across all universities.
Dashboard.noDeadlinesMessage: No upcoming deadlines. Click "New Application" to add one!

Essays.keyNarrativeHint: The AI will strongly weave this angle into your Master Profile data.
Essays.generatedDraftDesc: Your personalized essay draft will appear here.

Letters.aiReadsProfile: AI reads your saved profile data
Letters.letterParametersDesc: The AI combines these inputs with your profile to write a tailored letter.
Letters.keyPointsHint: These points are woven into your letter alongside your profile data.
Letters.generatedLetterEdit: Edit directly in the text area below.
Letters.generatedLetterEmpty: Your personalized letter will appear here.
Letters.fillParameters: Fill in the parameters on the left and click Generate.

Analytics.noData: No application data yet. Start tracking applications to see analytics.

Pricing.headline: Pay for your season. Not forever.
Pricing.subheadline: No subscriptions. No auto-charges. One payment via Telebirr or CBE Birr covers your entire application push — like a top-up, it's yours until it expires.
Pricing.securePayments: Pay securely by CBE or Telebirr transfer
Pricing.paymentErrorDesc: Failed to start payment process. Please try again.
Pricing.sprintCta: Get 30 Days — Pay with Telebirr / CBE
Pricing.seasonValueLine: ≈ 17 ETB/day — less than 5% of what an application agent charges
Pricing.seasonCta: Get 90 Days — Pay with Telebirr / CBE
Pricing.compareLine: One funded scholarship is worth more than all of it combined.
Pricing.faq1A: No. You pay once, get 30 or 90 days of unlimited access, and it simply expires. We never store your payment details or charge you automatically.
Pricing.faq2Q: What happens when my pass expires?
Pricing.faq2A: You drop back to the Free plan. Your documents, applications, and tracker stay yours forever.
Pricing.faq3A: Transfer the amount to our CBE or Telebirr account, then paste your transaction reference — your pass activates instantly.
Pricing.faq4Q: Can someone else pay for me?
Pricing.faq4A: Yes — anyone can transfer to our CBE or Telebirr account on your behalf. Just enter that transaction reference to activate your pass.
Pricing.payByTransfer: Already paid by bank transfer? Verify here
Pricing.transferSubtitle: Pay {amount} ETB for the {plan}, then paste your transaction reference to activate it instantly.
Pricing.transferStep1: 1. Send the exact amount to one of these accounts:
Pricing.transferRefHint: The reference / receipt number from your CBE, Telebirr, or bank SMS.
Pricing.transferSuffixHint: Last 8 digits of your CBE account. Leave blank for Telebirr and other providers.
Pricing.transferSuccessDesc: Your pass is now active. Enjoy unlimited access!
Pricing.transferFailedDesc: We couldn't verify that transfer. Check the reference and try again.

Plan.paymentSuccessDesc: Your pass is active. Enjoy unlimited access!
Plan.paymentFailedDesc: Your payment could not be verified. You were not charged — please try again.
